feed.title: realufo.org — NZ · NZDF
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from NZ · NZDF.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: NZDF — UFO/UAP reporting OIA response (2024-5199)
entry.summary: More recent OIA response on NZDF's UFO/UAP reporting practices — clarifies the post-2010 division of responsibility between NZDF and the Civil Aviation Authority.

entry.title: NZDF — UAP/UFO/USO OIA response (2023-4763)
entry.summary: NZDF's response to a 2023 OIA request on contemporary UAP/UFO/USO reporting procedure. Confirms NZDF no longer maintains a UFO file but redirects to Civil Aviation Authority.

entry.title: AIR 1080/6/897 — Kaikoura 1978 file (PDF)
entry.summary: The complete RNZAF file on the 1978 Kaikoura sightings — the most famous unexplained case in NZ aviation history.

entry.title: National Library of NZ — UFO files record
entry.summary: National Library catalog entry for the NZDF UFO file collection — the public-access master record.

entry.title: Archives New Zealand — homepage
entry.summary: Search the full Archway catalog at Archives NZ for AIR 39, AIR 1080, ABFK and related series.
